Mantras
Mantras relate to the repeated chanting of auspiciovs lines or words

Mantra for I mprovlng Ute
(This Mantra is from Ch. IX of the Bhag>Jad Geeta. It is the Verse 22)
Ananyaa sllchlnta yanto maam
Ye janaah paryuf)Basatey
Teshaam nityaa bhiyuktaa naam
Yogak$hemam Vahaamyaham
(It means: To those men who worship Me alone. thinking of no
otl'ler, of those ever-united. To those men. ever-united in love. who
surrender to Me. after having done their best. I secure what is not
already possessed. and preserve what they already possess).
Mantra for a Peaceful Ute
Sarveshaam Svaasrir Bhavatu
Sarveshaam Shaantir Bhavatu.
Sarveshaam Poornam Bhavatu
SatVeshaam Mangalam Bhavatu
Om ShanU, Shant/, Shanti.
(May Health abound forever. May Peace abound forever. May
complete abundance.
